<?php namespace Http\Message\Authentication; use Http\Message\Authentication; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; class Header implements Authentication { /** * @var string */ private $name; /** * @var string|string[] */ private $value; /** * @param string|string[] $value */ public function __construct(string $name, $value) { $this->name = $name; $this->value = $value; } public function authenticate(RequestInterface $request) { return $request->withHeader($this->name, $this->value); } }
